name: Prepayment of Farming Supplies

eligibility.description: Available to cash-basis taxpayers in the trade or business of farming who are 'qualified farm-related taxpayers' or whose prepaid supplies are less than 50% of other deductible farming expenses.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows cash-basis farmers to deduct the cost of feed, seed, fertilizer, and other supplies in the year purchased rather than the year consumed, provided the prepayment does not exceed 50% of total deductible farming expenses.
